ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "drone_model" TEXT /* Model of the drone */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the drone */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the drone */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the drone (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner or operator of the drone */,
  "drone_software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software running on the drone */,
  "drone_hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware */,
  "drone_firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware */,
  "drone_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drone */,
  "drone_model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was released */,
  "drone_battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity in mAh */,
  "drone_payload_capacity" REAL /* Maximum payload capacity in kg */,
  "drone_max_flying_time" INTEGER /* Maximum flying time in minutes */,
  "drone_last_fly_date" TEXT /* Date of the last flight */,
  "drone_total_flying_hours" INTEGER /* Total flying hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drones_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight data entry */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone associated with the flight data */,
  "time" REAL /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X position of the drone */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y position of the drone */,
  "z_position" REAL /* Z position of the drone */,
  "phi" REAL /* Phi (roll) angle of the drone */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta (pitch) angle of the drone */,
  "psi" REAL /* Psi (yaw) angle of the drone */,
  "x_velocity" REAL /* X velocity of the drone */,
  "y_velocity" REAL /* Y velocity of the drone */,
  "z_velocity" REAL /* Z velocity of the drone */,
  "phi_velocity" REAL /* Phi (roll) velocity of the drone */,
  "theta_velocity" REAL /* Theta (pitch) velocity of the drone */,
  "psi_velocity" REAL /* Psi (yaw) velocity of the drone */,
  "rotor_speed1" REAL /* Speed of rotor 1 */,
  "rotor_speed2" REAL /* Speed of rotor 2 */,
  "rotor_speed3" REAL /* Speed of rotor 3 */,
  "rotor_speed4" REAL /* Speed of rotor 4 */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the drone */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level percentage */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the drone */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "gps_accuracy" REAL /* GPS accuracy in meters */,
  "gps_satellites" INTEGER /* Number of GPS satellites used */,
  "gps_fix_quality" INTEGER /* Quality of GPS fix (1 = Fix, 2 = Float, 3 = RTK) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "flight_mode" TEXT /* Flight mode (e.g., manual, auto, return home) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the owner belongs to */,
  "owner_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  "owner_city" TEXT /* City of the owner */,
  "owner_state" TEXT /* State of the owner */,
  "owner_country" TEXT /* Country of the owner */,
  "owner_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "owner_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "owner_contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "owner_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight log */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone associated with the flight log */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled during the flight */,
  "max_altitude" REAL /* Maximum altitude reached during the flight */,
  "min_altitude" REAL /* Minimum altitude reached during the flight */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., completed, aborted, in progress) */,
  "flight_mode_used" TEXT /* Flight mode used during the flight */,
  "battery_start_level" REAL /* Battery level at the start of the flight */,
  "battery_end_level" REAL /* Battery level at the end of the flight */,
  "battery_consumed" REAL /* Battery consumed during the flight */,
  "flight_path" TEXT /* Path of the flight (e.g., coordinates) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight */,
  "wind_speed_log" REAL /* Average wind speed during the flight */,
  "wind_direction_log" INTEGER /* Average wind direction during the flight */,
  "gps_accuracy_log" REAL /* Average GPS accuracy during the flight */,
  "gps_satellites_log" INTEGER /* Average number of GPS satellites used */,
  "gps_fix_quality_log" INTEGER /* Average GPS fix quality */,
  "flight_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the flight data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, operations manager) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (1 = low, 2 = medium, 3 = high) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
